headings.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight
headings.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

button.primary: bg-primary text-background-dark font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded hover:bg-white transition-all duration-300
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/30 text-white font-medium uppercase tracking-widest rounded hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white transition-colors
button.subscribe: bg-white text-background-dark px-6 py-3 rounded font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-primary transition-colors text-sm

card.product: group relative bg-surface-dark rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300
card.feature: bg-background-dark p-8 rounded-lg border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden

components.badge: text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 uppercase rounded-sm

effects.technical-border: border border-primary/20 relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:-top-px after:-right-px after:w-2 after:h-2 after:border-t after:border-r after:border-primary
effects.scan-line: w-full h-[2px] bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-primary to-transparent animate-scan opacity-50 pointer-events-none

hierarchy_rules.dominant_60: Verde Forest (#243d34) - Usado en fondos principales y grandes superficies.
hierarchy_rules.secondary_35: Beige/Tan (#d6d1ca / #b79e7e) - Usado en superficies secundarias, textos, bordes técnicos y BOTONES.
hierarchy_rules.accent_05: Rojo (#e8402a) - Usado infinitesimalmente para alertas críticas, puntos de calor o indicadores de estado activo únicos.
